meta.title: FLUXX PMC — Private Military Corporation
meta.description: Elite private military corporation operating across the Stanton system. Precision force projection, asset security, armed escort, and strategic reconnaissance.

hero.title: FLUXX PMC
hero.subtitle: When diplomacy satisfies the politician and the enemy waits for nothing — you call us.
hero.tagline: Authorized Force. Calculated Violence. Zero Compromise.

home.overview_text: FLUXX PMC maintains persistent operational capability across all theaters within the Stanton system. From high-value asset denial to coordinated multi-domain strike packages, our units execute under centralized command with lethal precision and absolute accountability.

security.title: Static & Mobile Security
security.text: Layered defense perimeters, counter-intrusion protocols, and rapid-response QRF elements. Our security units enforce denial zones and neutralize threats before they materialize.

tactical.title: Direct Action Operations
tactical.text: Coordinated strike packages with integrated fire support. FLUXX assault elements are cleared for zero-margin engagements across space, atmospheric, and ground domains.

escort.title: Armed Escort & Convoy Defense
escort.text: Multi-ship escort formations with 360-degree threat coverage. Layered defensive screens with immediate counter-attack protocols upon hostile contact identification.
escort.highlight: Convoy Screen • VIP Movement • Route Dominance

recon.title: ISR & Electronic Warfare
recon.text: Low-signature intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance operations. Our SIGINT cells map hostile dispositions and feed real-time targeting data to command elements.

assault.title: Assault Division
assault.text: Direct action specialists. Ship-to-ship engagement, boarding operations, planetary assault, and hostile force neutralization. The sharp end of every FLUXX deployment.
assault.specialties: Ship Combat, Boarding Ops, Planetary Assault

recon.title: Recon Division
recon.text: Intelligence operatives conducting covert surveillance, electronic warfare, and target acquisition. Nothing moves in our AO without Recon knowing about it.

logistics.title: Logistics & Support
logistics.text: Forward base establishment, ammunition resupply, fuel management, and fleet sustainment. Without logistics, the war machine stops. We don't stop.

medical.title: Medical Division
medical.text: Battlefield trauma response, CASEVAC operations, and field triage under fire. Dedicated medical assets ensure our operators come home. Always.

home.trust_text: Every number above was earned under live fire. FLUXX has operated in the most hostile corridors of the Stanton system and delivered results when others pulled back. Our track record is not a marketing claim — it is an after-action report.

security.title: Security
security.fullDescription: Comprehensive perimeter lockdown and counter-intrusion operations for installations, mining facilities, and high-value assets. Our security units establish overlapping fields of fire and maintain persistent threat monitoring.

combat.title: Combat Ops
combat.fullDescription: Full-scale offensive operations with coordinated multi-ship strike packages and integrated ground assault elements. Tactical engagement against hostile forces with overwhelming firepower concentration.

escort.title: Escort
escort.fullDescription: Armed escort formations protecting cargo transports, VIP shuttles, and fleet movements through hostile corridors. Multi-layer defensive screens with immediate counter-attack capability.

recon.title: Recon
recon.fullDescription: Covert intelligence collection, target mapping, and threat assessment in denied or contested territories. Electronic warfare and SIGINT operations for pre-strike intelligence preparation.

differentiators.title: Centralized Command Authority
differentiators.text: Every operation flows through a verified chain of command. No rogue elements. No freelance chaos. Every operator knows who gives the order, and every order has accountability attached.

differentiators.title: Doctrine Over Ego
differentiators.text: We operate under established tactical doctrine and strict rules of engagement. Our operators don't improvise — they execute the plan. Your objectives become our mission parameters.

differentiators.title: Organic Combined Arms
differentiators.text: Medical, logistics, ISR, and fire support integrated into every deployment. You contract the full force — not isolated units hoping for the best. Every element supports the whole.

differentiators.title: Persistent Operational Readiness
differentiators.text: Threats don't operate on a schedule. FLUXX maintains 24/7 alert posture with quick-reaction forces staged for immediate deployment. When you call, we are already moving.

home.fleet_text: FLUXX PMC operates a diversified arsenal of combat, ISR, and support platforms. Every asset is mission-configured, crew-certified, and maintained at deployment-ready status. Our fleet doesn't sit in hangars — it holds the line.
home.join_text: FLUXX PMC is selectively recruiting combat-rated pilots, ground warfare specialists, and support operators. We do not accept applications — we accept candidates who survive our evaluation pipeline. Discipline. Proficiency. Zero exceptions.

about.hero_text: FLUXX PMC was not created — it was forged. Built by operators who understood that the frontier doesn't reward hesitation, and that professional violence, applied with discipline, is the only language that hostile space respects.
about.overview_text:
FLUXX Private Military Corporation is an independent defense contractor operating within the Stanton system. We provide full-spectrum military services to corporations, logistics operators, mining outfits, and sovereign entities that require professional armed force projection.

Our operators are not recruits — they are combat-proven veterans, former military aviators, and specialized warfare operators who have demonstrated lethality, discipline, and reliability under fire. Every member of FLUXX earned their position. No one was given a place.

precision.title: Precision Over Firepower
precision.text: Every operation is planned with surgical accuracy. We do not rely on overwhelming volume — we rely on calculated, decisive action that achieves objectives with minimal expenditure and zero collateral tolerance.

discipline.title: Discipline Is Non-Negotiable
discipline.text: FLUXX operators adhere to strict rules of engagement and an unbroken chain of command. Discipline is not a value — it is the operating system. Deviation is not tolerated. Period.

reliability.title: Reliability Under Extreme Conditions
reliability.text: When the tactical situation deteriorates and others withdraw, FLUXX holds the line. Our clients trust us because we have never failed to deliver under fire.

discretion.title: Absolute Operational Security
discretion.text: Client operations, routes, and asset details are compartmentalized and encrypted. FLUXX maintains strict OPSEC protocols — what happens on contract stays classified. No exceptions.

about.doctrine_text: FLUXX operates under a unified command doctrine that prioritizes speed, overwhelming tactical advantage at the point of contact, and seamless multi-domain coordination. Our operations are built on three pillars:

intel.title: Intelligence Dominance
intel.text: No operation begins without comprehensive battlespace preparation. Our ISR division maps the operational environment, identifies threats, and provides commanders with actionable intelligence before any engagement order is authorized.

coordination.title: Multi-Domain Integration
coordination.text: FLUXX deploys across space, atmosphere, and ground simultaneously. Our command architecture supports seamless coordination between ship-based strike elements, ground assault teams, and support assets — no domain left uncontrolled.

extraction.title: Violence of Action
extraction.text: When the execution order drops, FLUXX operators engage with speed and concentrated force that denies the enemy any opportunity to adapt. We strike hard, complete the objective, and extract — leaving nothing to chance.

track_record.title: Combat-Verified Record
track_record.text: 500+ operations completed across every environment in the Stanton system. A 98% success rate that wasn't built on marketing — it was built on after-action reports.

professionalism.title: Military-Grade Professionalism
professionalism.text: We conduct ourselves as a professional military force. Clients receive structured briefings, encrypted communication channels, and accountable leadership — not Discord chaos.

scalability.title: Scalable Force Projection
scalability.text: From a two-ship escort to a full division-level deployment, FLUXX scales to meet the threat. Our modular task organization allows rapid force packaging for any mission profile.

confidentiality.title: Zero-Leak Confidentiality
confidentiality.text: Every contract is handled under strict OPSEC protocols. FLUXX never discusses client operations, routes, or asset details with any external party. Your operation is classified from intake to debrief.

about.history_text:
FLUXX PMC was established in the Stanton system by a cadre of combat-hardened operators who recognized a critical gap: the frontier needed professional military capability, not glorified escort services. What began as a four-ship tactical cell providing high-risk escort runs has evolved into a multi-division private military corporation capable of executing complex combined-arms operations across the entire system.

Through selective recruitment, relentless operational standards, and a willingness to take contracts others refused, FLUXX grew from a single squadron into an organization with persistent force presence across Stanton. Our reputation was not built through spectacle — it was earned in the dark, one successful operation at a time.

operations.hero_text: FLUXX Operational Command coordinates all active deployments, force projection, and mission execution across the Stanton system. Every engagement is doctrine-driven, command-authorized, and executed under strict ROE. Deviation is not tolerated.

security.title: Security Operations
security.short_desc: Static and mobile asset denial. Layered perimeters, counter-intrusion, and 24/7 QRF.
security.text: Static and mobile security for installations, mining operations, and corporate facilities. Our security units establish overlapping defense perimeters, conduct persistent threat assessment, and maintain rapid-response capability for any incursion scenario.
security.detail: Includes: perimeter denial, counter-intrusion, threat surveillance, principal protection, facility hardening.

combat.title: Combat Deployments
combat.short_desc: Full-scale offensive operations. Coordinated multi-ship strike packages with ground integration.
combat.text: Full-scale offensive operations against hostile forces. FLUXX combat elements deploy in coordinated multi-ship formations with integrated ground assault teams, executing assault, interdiction, and area denial missions with lethal efficiency.
combat.detail: Includes: assault operations, area denial, interdiction, hostile force elimination, defensive operations.

recon.title: ISR Operations
recon.short_desc: Covert intelligence collection and threat mapping in denied/contested space.
recon.text: Covert intelligence, surveillance, and reconnaissance in contested or denied space. Our ISR operators utilize low-signature vessels and advanced sensor arrays to map enemy dispositions, track force movements, and identify vulnerabilities before the main force commits.
recon.detail: Includes: surveillance, target acquisition, electronic warfare, route reconnaissance, threat mapping.

escort.title: Escort Formations
escort.short_desc: Armed convoy defense through hostile corridors. Multi-layer threat screening.
escort.text: Armed convoy defense for cargo transports, personnel vessels, and fleet movements through contested corridors. FLUXX escort formations maintain 360-degree threat coverage and execute immediate counter-attack protocols upon hostile contact.
escort.detail: Includes: convoy screen, VIP transport, route dominance, cargo protection, fleet screening.

precision.title: Precision
precision.text: Every operation calculated to minimize expenditure and maximize effect. No excess force.

discipline.title: Discipline
discipline.text: Established protocols. Unbroken chain of command. Accountability at every echelon.

speed.title: Speed
speed.text: Rapid response and decisive execution. In contested space, seconds determine who lives.

mission.title: Mission First
mission.text: Objectives achieved. Operators returned. Contracts fulfilled. No exceptions.

step1.title: Contract Intake
step1.text: Client submits operational requirements, threat assessment, and desired outcomes. FLUXX command reviews, assigns a mission coordinator, and initiates planning.

step2.title: Intelligence Preparation
step2.text: Our ISR division conducts preliminary reconnaissance, assesses the battlespace, and develops a comprehensive mission plan including force composition, ROE, and contingency protocols.

step3.title: Force Packaging
step3.text: Based on the threat assessment, FLUXX assembles the task force — selecting operators, platforms, and support assets matched to the specific threat profile and operational requirements.

step4.title: Mission Brief
step4.text: All operators receive a detailed mission briefing covering objectives, timelines, contingencies, and PACE communications plan. Every unit understands their role and the commander's intent.

step5.title: Execution
step5.text: The operation is launched under centralized command with decentralized execution. Real-time adjustments flow through the C2 architecture as conditions evolve.

step6.title: ENDEX & Debrief
step6.text: Post-mission, FLUXX conducts a thorough after-action review and provides the client with a detailed report covering mission outcomes, force performance, and intelligence gathered.

operations.structure_text: FLUXX operates under a hierarchical command structure designed for clear accountability, rapid decision-making, and decentralized execution in high-threat environments.

command.title: Strategic Command
command.text: Senior leadership. Corporate strategy, major contract authorization, and overall force posture. Sets operational priorities and allocates resources across the organization.

operations.title: Operations Command
operations.text: Day-to-day operational planning and mission coordination. Translates strategic directives into actionable mission orders and oversees all force deployments.

division.title: Division Commanders
division.text: Each operational division (Assault, Recon, Logistics, Medical) is led by a combat-proven commander responsible for unit readiness, training standards, and mission execution.

squad.title: Squadron Leaders
squad.text: Tactical-level commanders who lead units in the field. Authority to make real-time decisions within the commander's intent and rules of engagement.

contracts.hero_text: FLUXX PMC delivers professional military capability on a contract basis. From single-ship escort to full division-level deployments — every contract is command-reviewed, threat-assessed, and operationally planned before a single asset leaves the hangar.
contracts.why_text: When you contract FLUXX PMC, you are not hiring freelancers — you are engaging a professional military organization with established doctrine, combat-proven operators, and an unbroken mission record. Every contract receives dedicated command oversight, encrypted communication, and accountability at every echelon.

security.title: Security Contracts
security.text: Ongoing protection for installations, mining operations, and corporate facilities. Includes threat assessment, perimeter establishment, and rapid response teams.
security.scope: Scope: 24/7 site surveillance, counter-intrusion, threat monitoring, incident response

escort.title: Escort Missions
escort.text: Armed escort for cargo transports, passenger vessels, and fleet movements through contested space. Multi-ship formations with layered defense protocols.
escort.scope: Scope: Route security, multi-ship formations, threat interdiction, emergency extraction
escort.team_size: Team Size: Single ship to full squadron

combat.title: Combat Operations
combat.text: Offensive military operations against hostile forces. Full mission planning, force assembly, and execution under FLUXX command.
combat.scope: Scope: Assault operations, hostile neutralization, area denial, defensive operations
combat.team_size: Team Size: Custom — single operator to full division
combat.rules_of_engagement: Defined per-mission based on threat level and operational context

recon.title: Strategic Recon
recon.text: Covert intelligence gathering, route surveying, and threat mapping. Ideal for pre-operation intelligence or ongoing surveillance requirements.
recon.scope: Scope: Surveillance ops, threat mapping, target acquisition, intel reports
recon.duration: Duration: One-time survey or ongoing monitoring
recon.sla: SLA: Daily intel briefs, full stealth operational security

process.title: Initial Request
process.text: Submit your operational requirements via the secure contract form. FLUXX Command reviews and assigns a dedicated mission coordinator within 48 hours.

process.title: Threat Assessment
process.text: Our intelligence division analyzes threat level, operational environment, duration, and asset requirements to develop an accurate force recommendation.

process.title: Mission Planning
process.text: FLUXX develops a comprehensive mission plan including force composition, rules of engagement, risk mitigation, and contingency protocols.

process.title: Contract Authorization
process.text: Command presents the operational plan with pricing, timelines, and terms. All conditions are formalized. Both parties sign before any deployment order is issued.

process.title: Force Packaging
process.text: Upon contract authorization, FLUXX assembles the dedicated task force and conducts final operational briefings. All assets are mission-configured.

process.title: Execution & Oversight
process.text: Mission execution with real-time command oversight, daily SITREP reporting, and tactical adjustments as operational conditions evolve.

terms.title: Operational Security
terms.text: All operational details, client information, and mission parameters are classified. FLUXX maintains encrypted communications and strict need-to-know protocols for all contracts.

terms.title: Dedicated Command Liaison
terms.text: Every contract receives a dedicated command officer as primary liaison. Direct encrypted communication access to mission commanders at all operational hours.

terms.title: Mission Guarantee
terms.text: FLUXX guarantees mission objectives will be met as defined in contract specifications. Failure to meet stated objectives results in service credit or full contract adjustment.

terms.title: 24/7 Operational Support
terms.text: Full operational support during contract execution. Command center monitoring, emergency protocols, force augmentation, and tactical adjustment on demand.

contracts.form_success: Operational request received and logged. FLUXX Operations Command will review your submission and respond within 48 hours with a preliminary threat assessment and deployment recommendation.
contracts.form_disclaimer: All submissions are reviewed by FLUXX Operations Command. Submission does not guarantee contract acceptance. FLUXX reserves the right to decline any request that conflicts with operational doctrine, existing deployments, or organizational values. All information is classified and compartmentalized.

pricing.details: Depends on threat level, location, and duration
Multi-ship discounts available for extended contracts
Based on mission complexity, duration, and asset deployment
Intelligence reports and ongoing monitoring available

recruitment.hero_text: FLUXX PMC does not recruit — we select. Our evaluation pipeline is designed to identify operators who possess the discipline, tactical proficiency, and mental resilience required for high-threat military operations. If you cannot perform under pressure, you will not pass.

pilots_logistics.title: Pilots & Logistics
pilots_logistics.description: The backbone of FLUXX force projection. Our pilots command the battlespace while logistics ensures the war machine never stops. Both roles are critical — and there is no room for passengers.

pilots.title: Combat Pilots
pilots.text: Experienced aviators cleared for high-threat flight operations. Must demonstrate proficiency in ship-to-ship engagement, formation flying, and multi-role mission execution.

logistics.title: Logistics Operators
logistics.text: Force sustainment specialists managing supply chains, platform maintenance, and mission coordination. Must operate effectively under pressure with zero margin for error.

qualifications: Combat flight experience or logistics background

assault.title: Assault Division
assault.description: Direct action specialists trained for boarding operations, planetary assault, and hostile force elimination. The operators who execute the missions nobody else will take.
qualifications: FPS combat proficiency and tactical awareness
Boarding operation experience or willingness to train
Ability to follow rules of engagement precisely
Physical and mental resilience in hostile environments

recon.title: Recon Division
recon.description: Intelligence operatives who gather data, conduct surveillance, and map the battlespace before the main force commits. The difference between a successful operation and a disaster starts here.
qualifications: Ability to work solo or in tight teams

requirements_list.r1: Active Star Citizen account with verified RSI handle
requirements_list.r2: Demonstrated discipline in structured military operations
requirements_list.r3: Absolute adherence to chain of command — no exceptions
requirements_list.r4: Commitment to scheduled deployments and operational readiness
requirements_list.r5: Professional communication and situational awareness under fire
requirements_list.r6: Zero tolerance for insubordination, drama, or operational compromise

recruitment.apply_text: Submit your candidacy through our official channels. All applicants undergo background evaluation, tactical assessment, and a probationary deployment period. There are no shortcuts.
recruitment.apply_step2: Navigate to the recruitment intake channel
recruitment.apply_step3: Submit your RSI handle and operational background
recruitment.apply_step4: Complete tactical assessment with command staff
recruitment.apply_step5: Receive division assignment and begin probation

contact.hero_text: All inbound communications are processed through encrypted channels. Contract inquiries, enlistment applications, and partnership proposals are monitored and triaged by FLUXX Operations Command within 48 hours.

inquiries.title: Contract Request
inquiries.description: Require FLUXX force projection for security, escort, combat, or ISR operations? Initiate your contract request through our secure Discord channel.

inquiries.title: Enlistment Inquiry
inquiries.description: Interested in joining FLUXX PMC? Review our divisions, operational roles, and evaluation pipeline. Discord recruitment intake is your entry point.

inquiries.title: General Intelligence
inquiries.description: Questions about FLUXX capabilities, organizational structure, or operational posture? Our community channels and RSI organization page provide answers.

inquiries.title: Strategic Partnership
inquiries.description: Interested in inter-organizational operations or strategic alliances? FLUXX Command staff evaluates all partnership proposals through Discord.

discord.title: Discord — Primary C2
discord.text: Primary command and control hub for FLUXX PMC. Real-time operational updates, contract intake, enlistment processing, and direct communication with command elements. All request types processed here.

org.title: RSI Organization
org.text: Official Star Citizen organization profile. Review our roster, fleet registry, organizational structure, and operational status. Essential intelligence before engaging with FLUXX.

footer.description: Private Military Corporation. Stanton System. Authorized force projection, asset security, armed escort, and strategic reconnaissance for qualified clients.
footer.disclaimer: FLUXX PMC is a fictional organization within Star Citizen. Not affiliated with Cloud Imperium Games.
